Off Calendar Sep-08-2004 Continued To Dec-14-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 12/14/2004 at 10:00 a.m., in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-07-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Steger Johnson, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Glee Lorette Greenwod
James Attridge, Esq. on behalf of defendant Starving Students, Inc.

Counsel having met with Judge Pro Tem, informed the Court that they reached a settlement. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Parties stipulate for entry of judgment. Defendant Starving Students, Inc. to pay plaintiff Glee Lorette Greenwood the sum of $18,000.00. Payment schedule as follows: $8,000.00 to be paid by June 30, 2004; $5,000.00 to be paid by Aug. 30, 2004, and $5,000.00 to be paid by Sept. 30, 2004. Upon completion of payment of the judgment, the plaintiff will file a full satisfaction of judgment. Counsel to prepare written stipulation, and judgment pursuant to stipulation.

Hon. Robert Dondero; Clerks: D. Boffi/V. Mu Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce (206)
